name: Order Express - Huntington Park Check Cashing
description_short: Order Express operates 75+ branches across the US offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and emerging services like Bitcoin ATMs. No bank account required.
description_long: Order Express has positioned itself as a diversified financial services provider since 1993, serving over 150,000 customers across 75+ branches in 18 states. The company began as a check-cashing operation but has expanded into a multi-service platform addressing unbanked and underbanked communities. Their core check-cashing service processes transactions in under 5 minutes without requiring a bank account, directly competing with traditional banking access barriers. The company also offers international money transfers to 100+ countries (with emphasis on Mexico), bill payment services covering 100,000+ billers, courier services, plane ticket booking, vehicle registration services, and Bitcoin ATM operations through CoinFlip partnership. Order Express differentiates itself through bilingual staff (English/Spanish), extended hours (7 days a week), multi-service convenience at single locations, and a loyalty program. The company emphasizes regulatory compliance and security across all offerings. However, as a check-cashing service provider, Order Express operates in a category that typically carries higher fees than traditional banking, and specific fee schedules are not disclosed on the website. The Bitcoin ATM offering is outsourced to CoinFlip rather than proprietary. While the company claims 30+ years of trusted service, detailed customer complaint data, fee transparency, and regulatory examination records are not available through their website.
address: 2640 E Florence Ave, Huntington Park, CA 90255

company_info.headquarters: 2640 E Florence Ave, Huntington Park, CA 90255

pros: No bank account required for check cashing and financial services
Fast processing—check cashing completed in under 5 minutes
Multi-service platform combining check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and Bitcoin ATMs in one location
Wide geographic reach with 75+ branches across 18 states
Money transfers to 100+ countries with same-day or minute-level delivery options
Regulated and compliant financial services provider
cons: Fee structure not transparent on website—specific check cashing fees not disclosed
Bitcoin ATM service operated by third party (CoinFlip), not proprietary
Limited to 18 states; significant geographic gaps for national coverage
No online or mobile check cashing option—requires in-person visit to branch
Vehicle registration services limited to select states only
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts needing immediate check cashing
Spanish-speaking customers seeking bilingual financial services
Individuals sending regular remittances to Mexico or other countries
Consumers needing same-day bill payment or multiple financial services at one location
diagnosis: Order Express is best for unbanked consumers and Spanish-speaking immigrants who need immediate check cashing, bill payment, and remittance services without a bank account. The main caveat is that fee structures are not publicly disclosed on their website, and despite multi-service offerings, the core value proposition remains check cashing—a service category with inherently higher costs than traditional banking.
services: Instant check cashing (no bank account required, under 5 minutes)
Bill payment services (100,000+ national and international billers)
Bitcoin ATM (buy and sell cryptocurrency via CoinFlip partnership)
Courier services (domestic and international package delivery)
Plane ticket booking (domestic and international flights)
Vehicle registration, plates, permits, and fines payment
Cash pickup and bank deposit options for money transfers
